name: playwright-infor-nexus-tool
description: Local Playwright app for Excel-driven Infor Nexus automation.

scripts.check: node --check lib/index.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check lib/server/index.js && node --check lib/workflows/btp-po-decisions-workflow.js && node --check lib/excel/btp-po-decisions-parser.js
